_publications._publicationTitle: A Fibroblast-Derived Secretome Stimulates the Growth and Invasiveness of 3D Plexiform Neurofibroma Spheroids.

_contextSnippet: There was no growth of pNF1 spheroids when sEVs were depleted from the fibroblast-CM...and ipNF05.5
details: No growth observed when small extracellular vesicles were depleted from fibroblast-conditioned media
